blogPosts.title: Using CrawlDoctor for Marketing: Tracking Human Users, AI Bots, and Conversion Signals
blogPosts.excerpt: A thought-leadership essay on how marketing teams can use CrawlDoctor to understand AI crawler traffic, track buyer journeys, measure campaign performance, and improve conversion paths.

caseStudies.title: How We Built CrawlDoctor
caseStudies.description: A technical case study on building an AI crawler, journey analytics, and lead attribution platform with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and React.
